title: Linen Ellipses Table Cover with Lace Trim, Light Yellow Lace Dustproof Home Festival Table Cloth for Dining Room Kitchen, 30 * 45cm
seller_info_text: Wuhan Zhaoyao International Trade Co., Ltd
features: 【PACKAGE INCLUDE】You will receive a light yellow linen oval tablecloth cover, which measures 30 * 45cm and features an elegant lace design.

【QUALITY MATERIAL】This cloth cover towel is made of high-quality linen material and is equipped with exquisite lace. The overall texture is superior, not easy to wear or fade, and can be used for a long time.
【VERSATILE DESIGN】White linen textured fabric surrounded by lace, paired with light yellow tones, suitable for most decorative styles and can be used as different types of home decor.

【WIDELY APPLICATIN】Linen lace tablecloth can be used for home decoration during weddings, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, Easter, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, and other holidays. It can also be used for desktop decoration in daily life.
【IDEAL GIFT】Our mat can be an excellent gift choice as a gift for loved ones on Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, baby showers, Valentine's Day, Easter, and other holidays.
